rationale: Section 11.132 provides a separate percentage-based exemption for donated homesteads of disabled veterans. It references §11.13 only for the definition of 'residence homestead,' not for the dollar exemption amount in §11.13(b). No conflict arises.
quote: "Residence homestead" has the meaning assigned by Section 11.13.
_note: §11.132's exemption is percentage-of-appraised-value based, tied to disability rating, not to the §11.13(b) dollar exemption amount. The cross-reference is definitional only.
